subject: [RFC PATCH v4 23/27] mm/cram: add compressed ram memory management subsystem

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the complexity of the CRAM subsystem and its potential impact on system performance. Suggested simplifying the implementation and providing more detailed documentation.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This RFC patch proposes a new compressed RAM (CRAM) memory management subsystem, which manages folios demoted to N_MEMORY_PRIVATE nodes via the standard kernel LRU. The CRAM subsystem limits entry into compressed memory by demotion and utilizes write-protect to prevent unbounded writes to compressed memory pages.
